allow: Bash(node -e "const d=[];process.stdin.on\(''data'',c=>d.push\(c\)\);process.stdin.on\(''end'',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d.join\(''''\)\);const v=j.find\(x=>parseFloat\(x.summary.tvl\)>100000\);console.log\(''allTime pnls:'',v.pnls.find\(p=>p[0]===''allTime''\)[1].slice\(-3\)\);console.log\(''Has followerCount?'', ''followerCount'' in v.summary\);console.log\(''Has leaderCommission?'', ''leaderCommission'' in v.summary\);console.log\(''Relationship:'', v.summary.relationship\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=[];process.stdin.on\(''data'',c=>d.push\(c\)\);process.stdin.on\(''end'',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d.join\(''''\)\);console.log\(''Top-level keys:'',Object.keys\(j\)\);if\(j.summary\)console.log\(''Has summary''\);else if\(j.name\)console.log\(''No summary wrapper, direct fields:'',Object.keys\(j\).slice\(0,10\)\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=[];process.stdin.on\(''data'',c=>d.push\(c\)\);process.stdin.on\(''end'',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d.join\(''''\)\);console.log\(''followerState:'',JSON.stringify\(j.followerState\)\);console.log\(''followers count:'',j.followers?.length\);console.log\(''portfolio count:'',j.portfolio?.length\);console.log\(''apr:'',j.apr\);console.log\(''leaderCommission:'',j.leaderCommission\);console.log\(''isClosed:'',j.isClosed\);console.log\(''has pnl?'',\(''pnl'' in j\)\);console.log\(''has tvl?'',\(''tvl'' in j\)\);console.log\(''portfolio sample:'',j.portfolio?.length>0?JSON.stringify\(j.portfolio[0]\):''empty''\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=[];process.stdin.on\(''data'',c=>d.push\(c\)\);process.stdin.on\(''end'',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d.join\(''''\)\);console.log\(''Type:'', typeof j, Array.isArray\(j\)?''array'':''''\);if\(Array.isArray\(j\)\){console.log\(''Length:'',j.length\);console.log\(''First:'',JSON.stringify\(j[0],null,2\)\)}else{console.log\(''Keys:'',Object.keys\(j\)\);const k=Object.keys\(j\)[0];if\(k\){const v=j[k];console.log\(''First key value type:'',typeof v,Array.isArray\(v\)?''array len=''+v.length:''''\);if\(Array.isArray\(v\)&&v.length>0\)console.log\(''Sample:'',JSON.stringify\(v[0],null,2\)\)}}}\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); rows=d.get\(''leaderboardRows'',[]\); print\(rows[0][''ethAddress''] if rows else ''none''\)")

Bash(node -e "async function main\(\) { const res = await fetch\(''https://api.hyperliquid.xyz/info'', { method: ''POST'', headers: {''Content-Type'': ''application/json''}, body: JSON.stringify\({type:''referral'', user:''0xe010eC500720bE68F33dBFD87BDc111Ac0347507''}\) }\); const data = await res.text\(\); console.log\(data\); } main\(\);")

Bash(node -e "async function main\(\) { const res = await fetch\(''https://api.hyperliquid.xyz/info'', { method: ''POST'', headers: {''Content-Type'': ''application/json''}, body: JSON.stringify\({type:''referral'', user:''0x72f6595a9c6afc85a7e6e2b7aff53cd1a71bbcf5''}\) }\); const data = await res.text\(\); console.log\(data\); } main\(\);")

Bash(node -e "async function main\(\) { const res = await fetch\(''https://api.hyperliquid.xyz/info'', { method: ''POST'', headers: {''Content-Type'': ''application/json''}, body: JSON.stringify\({type:''referral'', user:''0xAf3FB7c3e71e8B4BaD6D46bE968aDF516Df651a3''}\) }\); const data = await res.text\(\); console.log\(data\); } main\(\);")

Bash(node -e "async function main\(\) { const res1 = await fetch\(''https://api.hyperliquid.xyz/info'', { method: ''POST'', headers: {''Content-Type'': ''application/json''}, body: JSON.stringify\({type:''subAccounts'', user:''0xdfc24b077bc1425ad1dea75bcb6f8158e10df303''}\) }\); console.log\(''subAccounts:'', await res1.text\(\)\); const res2 = await fetch\(''https://api.hyperliquid.xyz/info'', { method: ''POST'', headers: {''Content-Type'': ''application/json''}, body: JSON.stringify\({type:''extraAgents'', user:''0xdfc24b077bc1425ad1dea75bcb6f8158e10df303''}\) }\); console.log\(''extraAgents:'', await res2.text\(\)\); const res3 = await fetch\(''https://api.hyperliquid.xyz/info'', { method: ''POST'', headers: {''Content-Type'': ''application/json''}, body: JSON.stringify\({type:''userFees'', user:''0xdfc24b077bc1425ad1dea75bcb6f8158e10df303''}\) }\); const t = await res3.text\(\); console.log\(''userFees:'', t.substring\(0,800\)\); } main\(\);")

Bash(node -e "async function main\(\) { const res = await fetch\(''https://api.hyperliquid.xyz/info'', { method: ''POST'', headers: {''Content-Type'': ''application/json''}, body: JSON.stringify\({type:''userFees'', user:''0xdfc24b077bc1425ad1dea75bcb6f8158e10df303''}\) }\); const j = JSON.parse\(await res.text\(\)\); console.log\(''Keys:'', Object.keys\(j\)\); console.log\(''dailyUserVlm sample:'', JSON.stringify\(j.dailyUserVlm?.[0]\)\); console.log\(''dailyUserVlm length:'', j.dailyUserVlm?.length\); console.log\(''feeSchedule:'', JSON.stringify\(j.feeSchedule\)\); console.log\(''userCrossRate:'', j.userCrossRate\); console.log\(''userAddRate:'', j.userAddRate\); console.log\(''activeReferralDiscount:'', j.activeReferralDiscount\); } main\(\);")

Bash(node -e "async function main\(\) { const res = await fetch\(''https://api.hyperliquid-testnet.xyz/info'', { method: ''POST'', headers: {''Content-Type'': ''application/json''}, body: JSON.stringify\({type:''subAccounts'', user:''0xdfc24b077bc1425ad1dea75bcb6f8158e10df303''}\) }\); console.log\(''testnet subAccounts:'', await res.text\(\)\); const res2 = await fetch\(''https://api.hyperliquid-testnet.xyz/info'', { method: ''POST'', headers: {''Content-Type'': ''application/json''}, body: JSON.stringify\({type:''extraAgents'', user:''0xdfc24b077bc1425ad1dea75bcb6f8158e10df303''}\) }\); console.log\(''testnet extraAgents:'', await res2.text\(\)\); } main\(\);")
